3192190.name: Second Rate Superheroes Soundtrack
3192190.description:
This is the soundtrack for Second Rate Superheroes. It includes 18 base tracks (including the achievement unlockable tracks), as well as the main menu theme, alternate main menu theme, Gameover theme, and any unreleased tracks that will make it into the game as an unlockable. 

New songs will be automatically added to the OST files as soon as they are ready / or released to the game.
